title: CI Recovery — diagnose and repair systemic Quality Gates / Issue Verification failures

steps.name: LF Normalization — biome format --write
steps.detail: .gitattributes already existed (PR #269). biome format --write applied to 50 files. biome format . exits 0 (447 files, No fixes applied).

steps.name: Add permissions to quality-gates.yml
steps.detail: Added workflow-level permissions: contents: read, actions: write

steps.name: Repair verify-issues.yml
steps.detail: Node version 20→22, removed unnecessary gh auth login step, added actions: write permission

steps.name: Build before Stryker mutation tests
steps.detail: Added npm run build step before Stryker in both mutation-fast and mutation-safety jobs

steps.name: Redis service for Playwright E2E
steps.detail: Added Redis 7 Alpine service container with health check to e2e-playwright job

biome_format.note: pre-existing issues-all.json size limit (1.2 MiB > 1.0 MiB config) is not a formatting error

known_limitations: GitHub Actions zero-step failures are a GitHub platform issue (runner quota/billing) — NOT fixed by workflow config changes
GitHub-CI remains advisory-only per CI Policy v1
evidence/github-issue-cleanup/issues-all.json (1.2 MiB) exceeds Biome max file size config — pre-existing, not blocking
